settings.title: Settings
settings.tab.general.title: General Settings
settings.tab.general.subtitle: Environment, language and display preferences.
settings.tab.editor.title: Editor Settings
settings.tab.editor.subtitle: Tune writing behavior and text metrics.
settings.tab.typography.title: Typography & Display
settings.tab.typography.subtitle: Live preview of your reading experience.
settings.tab.ai.title: AI Engine
settings.tab.ai.subtitle: Manage provider and API key status.
settings.tab.archive.title: Archive & Safety
settings.tab.archive.subtitle: Protect your drafts with local-first controls.
export.title: Export Document
export.emptyDoc: Nothing to export — document is empty.
shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
onboarding.step1.label: Step 1 of 4 — Look & Feel
onboarding.step1.title: Choose your writing environment
onboarding.step1.subtitle: You can change this any time in Settings → Appearance.
onboarding.step2.label: Step 2 of 4 — Your Vault
onboarding.step2.title: Where will your writing live?
onboarding.step2.subtitle: VanFolio keeps all your Markdown files in one folder — your vault. We'll create a Welcome note to get you started.
onboarding.step2.noFolderHint: Click Change to pick a folder
onboarding.step3.label: Step 3 of 4 — The Interface
onboarding.step3.title: Everything has its place
onboarding.step3.subtitle: Hover a card to highlight the matching area in the workspace behind this modal.
onboarding.step4.label: Step 4 of 4 — All Set
onboarding.step4.title: You're ready to write
onboarding.step4.subtitle: Your workspace is configured. Open a file from the sidebar or start a new one with Ctrl+N.
onboarding.step4.vaultNotSet: Not set — you can pick one later in Settings
onboarding.step4.discoveryValue: On — hover over novel features to see quick-start tips
onboarding.anatomy.sidebar.title: Sidebar
onboarding.anatomy.sidebar.desc: Browse your vault, recent files, and table of contents.
onboarding.anatomy.editor.title: Editor
onboarding.anatomy.editor.desc: Distraction-free Markdown with live syntax highlighting.
onboarding.anatomy.preview.title: Preview
onboarding.anatomy.preview.desc: Rendered view — toggle with Ctrl+P or the toolbar button.
onboarding.anatomy.slash.title: Slash Commands
onboarding.anatomy.slash.desc: Type / in the editor to insert headings, tables, code blocks, and more.
discovery.slash.title: Slash Commands
discovery.slash.desc: Type / at the start of a line to insert headings, tables, code blocks, and more.
discovery.zen.title: Zen Mode
discovery.zen.desc: Hides all panels for a clean, distraction-free writing experience.
discovery.previewToolbar.title: Export & Preview Toolbar
discovery.previewToolbar.desc: Export to PDF, DOCX, or HTML. Toggle split-preview from here too.
discovery.typography.title: Typography Settings
discovery.typography.desc: Customise editor fonts, sizes, line-height, and preview styles.
discovery.ai.title: AI Engine
discovery.ai.desc: Connect Anthropic, OpenAI, or Gemini to power the AI writing assistant.
discovery.archive.title: Version History
discovery.archive.desc: Browse and restore previous snapshots of any file in your vault.
settings.editor.cleanProseModeDesc: Hide markdown syntax, show styled text
settings.editor.backupOnExportDesc: Create local archive copy before downloading
settings.typography.introDesc: Choose fonts and spacing that suit your writing style. Changes apply instantly — the live preview on the right shows exactly what your documents will look like.
settings.typography.customFontsDesc: Import custom fonts (.ttf / .otf) to use in Typeface Selection below.
settings.typography.fontsLoaded: {count} custom font(s) loaded. (Click Reload after manual changes)
archive.versionHistoryDesc: Version History saves automatic snapshots so you can roll back any draft. Local Backup copies your vault to a safe folder — all data stays on your device, never uploaded.
archive.privacyNote: Privacy Guaranteed — All data stays on your device. Your manuscripts are never uploaded.
archive.versionDesc: Protect your work with automatic local versioning. Roll back to any previous draft in seconds.
archive.backupDesc: Automated archival of your documents to a safe local folder for disaster recovery.
shortcuts.hint: Click {edit} on any row, then press your new key combo.
toc.title: Table of Contents
sidebar.openFolderHint: Open a folder to browse files.
settings.typography.previewPara1: Every draft is a trace of thought, and every revision is a decision made in time.
settings.typography.previewQuote: The quality of writing is inseparable from the quality of attention.
settings.typography.previewPara2: Inline code like saveSnapshot() can carry as much meaning as prose.
settings.typography.previewPara3: True sophistication lies not in the abundance of choice, but in the precision of the essentials. A typeface is more than just a shape; it is the voice of your internal dialogue, captured in ink and pixels.
main.exportFailedImageMsg: Cannot export to {format} because an image was not found.
main.exportFailedImageDetail:
Missing path: {path}

Please check your Markdown links. A premium document cannot be generated with broken images.
main.choosePngFolder: Choose Output Folder for PNG Pages
license.downgrade.toast: Trial has expired. App switched to Free.
settings.tab.license.title: License & Plan
settings.tab.license.subtitle: Activate, manage, or upgrade your VanFolio license.
license.status.networkError: Could not verify — last check failed
license.activate.title: Activate License
license.activate.tooManyFails: Too many failed attempts. Please wait {sec}s.
license.deactivate.confirm: You are about to deactivate this machine. You will need to enter your license key again to use Trial/Pro features. Continue?
license.deactivate.success: Device deactivated. License key will be needed to reactivate.
license.upgradeComingSoon: Pro licenses are not yet available. Stay tuned — we'll announce when purchasing opens.
license.error.invalidKey: This license key is not recognized. Please double-check and try again.
license.error.wrongProduct: This key is not for VanFolio. Please check your purchase.
license.error.deviceLimit: This license has already reached its device limit. Please deactivate one of your active machines. If the old machine is no longer accessible, contact support to reset activation.
license.error.ghostInstance: It looks like this license was activated on this machine before, but the activation data was lost. The old slot cannot be reclaimed automatically. Please contact support to reset activation.
license.error.disabled: This license has been disabled. Please contact support.
license.error.expired: This license has expired. Please contact support or purchase a new license.
license.error.networkError: Could not reach the activation server. Check your connection and try again.
license.error.invalidResponse: Unexpected server response. Please try again later.
license.error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support.
license.error.notTrialKey: This key is not a trial license key.
license.error.unknownVariant: This license key variant is not recognized. Please contact support.
license.error.deviceTrialConsumed: A trial has already been used on this device. Each device is allowed one trial only.
license.error.deviceMismatch: This trial is registered to a different device. Please contact support.
license.error.trialNotDeactivatable: Trial licenses are bound to this device and cannot be deactivated. Contact support if you need to transfer your trial.
license.error.trialTemporarilyUnavailabl: Trial activation is temporarily paused for maintenance. Please try again later.
license.error.fingerprintUnavailable: We couldn't identify this device. Please contact support to activate your trial.
license.error.fingerprintLowConfidence: We couldn't reliably identify this device. Please contact support to activate your trial.
license.error.instanceStale: Your trial activation record is no longer valid. Please contact support.
license.error.activationExhausted: This trial key has no remaining activation slots. Please contact support.
license.error.rateLimited: Too many activation attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
license.error.environmentUnsupported: This environment is not supported for trial activation. Please contact support.
license.trial.deviceBound: Trial license is bound to this device.
license.trial.grandfatherFingerprintUnav: Your trial was carried over from a previous version. Device verification was unavailable at the time. Please contact support if you need to move your trial to a new device.
license.trial.grandfatherFingerprintLowC: Your trial was carried over from a previous version. Device verification had low confidence. Please contact support if you need to move your trial to a new device.
license.ghostInstance: If the old machine is no longer accessible, contact support — they can reset the slot for you.
license.clockTamper.description: Your system clock appears to have been set back. Trial features are paused. Fix your system clock and connect to the internet to restore access.
upgrade.pro.desc: This feature is only available in the Pro version.
update.available: A new version of VanFolio is available ({version}).
about.title: About VanFolio
autoAsset.saveFirst: Please save the file before inserting images.
export.watermarkNote: Free version includes a VanFolio watermark on PDF.
export.backupFailedContinue: Could not create a snapshot before export, but export will continue.
versionHistory.restoreConfirm: Restore this snapshot into the editor? Current content will be marked as unsaved.
versionHistory.restoreReadError: Could not read the selected snapshot.
versionHistory.restored: Snapshot loaded into the editor. Save if you want to apply it.
versionHistory.openRequiresPath: Version history is only available for files with a saved path.
versionHistory.title: Version History
versionHistory.empty: No snapshots for this file yet.
settings.ai.comingSoonSubtitle: AI provider settings and API key management will be available in the next release.
archive.cleanupConfirm: Clean up old snapshots using the current retention policy?
main.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?
